content.body:
Extends both .leo/schema.json and cli/internal/cmd/schema.json with eight
new optional top-level fields for memory schema evolution (#68). All fields
are excluded from `required`, preserving full backward compatibility with
existing legacy memory files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(schema): add provenance, confidence, classification, compartments, landmark, centrality_score fields
